title: Itemframe Tooltip
description: A Fabric mod for Minecraft that renders full item tooltips when hovering items inside item frames, matching the appearance and behavior of inventory tooltips.
body:
# ItemFrameTooltip
A small Fabric client mod that renders full item tooltips when hovering items in item frames so they match inventory tooltips.
- Renders the same tooltip style and behavior as inventory tooltips when looking at an item in an item frame.
- Client-side only; lightweight quality-of-life improvement.
## Usage
Point the crosshair at any item frame containing an item to see its full tooltip.
## Multiplayer
The mod is client-side only, but verify the server permits client mods before using it on a multiplayer server.

## Dependencies
Starting Version 1.2. This mod requires ModMenu.
